pr.title: feat(httpx): bump httpx and switch to AsyncClient (closes #905)
pr.body:
Bumps `httpx` to the latest minor and switches `ApiClient` from the sync `Client` to `AsyncClient` so the worker pool can interleave requests. The dependency bump and the behavior change are kept together because `AsyncClient` requires the new minor.

Fixes #905. Manual smoke against staging passes; new test in `tests/test_api_client.py` exercises the async path.
pr.author: octocat
